title: End U.N. Censorship Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Foreign Affairs.
crs_summary: End U.N. Censorship Act This bill specifies that no federal funds may be made available to support the iVerify tool (a fact-checking tool developed by the United Nations Development Programme) or any other effort that seeks to label speech or expression as mal-, mis-, or dis-information.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Foreign Affairs.
